game_text: Reveal up to 2 Blue Team Assets. If Gateway or SCADA Web Interface is revealed draw 1 card.
flavor_text: Port scanning helps attackers identify exposed services and reachable systems.
learning_note: Reconnaissance gives attackers context for choosing targets and attack paths.

game_text: Look at Blue Team's hand. Choose one Asset card from it. Blue Team reveals that card until it is played or discarded.
flavor_text: Public clues become private pressure.
learning_note: Public information can help attackers understand technology vendors staff and exposed systems.

game_text: Deal 3 damage to one Asset. If Network Scan or Public Info Gathering was played this turn deal +1 damage.
flavor_text: Low-skill attackers can cause real impact when public exploit code matches exposed systems.
learning_note: Public exploit code can turn known weaknesses into practical attacks.

game_text: Attach to an Endpoint Asset. At the start of Red Team's turn that Asset takes 1 damage.
flavor_text: Commodity malware can create recurring impact when endpoint containment is delayed.
learning_note: Pre-built malware lowers attacker skill requirements and can persist if not contained.

game_text: Disable one Operator until Blue Team's next turn unless Blue Team discards 1 card.
flavor_text: The first click was human.
learning_note: Phishing often targets staff access and can delay operational response.

game_text: Deal 2 damage to Operator Laptop or SCADA Web Interface. If Phishing Campaign was played this game draw 1 card.
flavor_text: One link moved the incident forward.
learning_note: Malicious links are common delivery methods for credential theft and malware.

game_text: Deal 2 damage to Operator Laptop. If damaged you may play Pre Built Malware Package for 1 less this turn.
flavor_text: The file looked routine until it ran.
learning_note: Attachments can deliver payloads that affect user workstations and operational access.

game_text: Deal 3 damage to SCADA Web Interface Gateway or RTU or PLC. Port Closure reduces this damage by 2.
flavor_text: The weakness was known before the attack.
learning_note: Known vulnerabilities become dangerous when systems remain exposed or unpatched.

game_text: Deal 3 damage. MFA cancels this card's damage bonus and reduces damage by 1.
flavor_text: The account became the entry point.
learning_note: Credential abuse is a common path into remote and operational systems.

game_text: Deal 2 damage. If MFA is not active disable one Operator until Blue Team's next turn.
flavor_text: One weak password can slow a whole team.
learning_note: Password spraying abuses weak or reused credentials across accounts.

game_text: Attach to Operator Laptop or SCADA Web Interface after it is damaged. Red Team's next Network attack against that Asset costs 1 less.
flavor_text: Remote access turned damage into control.
learning_note: Remote access malware or tooling can help attackers maintain access after initial compromise.

game_text: While active, Red Team may draw 1 card after playing an Install card. Destroy this Asset if Blue Team plays Deep Packet ICS Monitor.
flavor_text: The compromised system called home.
learning_note: Command and control enables attackers to coordinate tools and continue operations.

game_text: Once per turn, reduce the cost of an Attack by 1 if Red Team has damaged an Asset this game.
flavor_text: Control turns access into pressure.
learning_note: Command channels represent attacker coordination after initial access.

game_text: Disable one Operator until Blue Team's next turn. If Malicious Link or Malicious Attachment was played this game draw 1 card.
flavor_text: The message looked like a community alert.
learning_note: Coordinated phishing increases social pressure and can delay operational response.

game_text: Deal 2 damage to a public-facing Asset. If Public Info Gathering is in your discard pile Blue Team loses 1 SCP.
flavor_text: The homepage became the headline.
learning_note: Defacement can create reputational impact and distract responders during an incident.

game_text: If Billing Database Email Server or SCADA Web Interface is damaged Blue Team loses 2 SCP.
flavor_text: The leak turned operations into a public crisis.
learning_note: Data exposure can create legal trust and operational consequences beyond system downtime.

game_text: The next Actions on Objectives card costs 1 less. If Website Defacement is active Blue Team discards 1 card.
flavor_text: The crowd arrived before the facts.
learning_note: Public pressure can complicate incident communications and response prioritization.

game_text: For the next turn Blue Team Recover cards cost 1 additional resource unless SOC Analyst is active.
flavor_text: The campaign created noise around the outage.
learning_note: Coordinated attention can overload communications and increase pressure on small security teams.

game_text: Deal 2 damage to an Asset with MFA inactive. If Password Spray is in your discard pile deal +1 damage.
flavor_text: Reused passwords made the campaign scalable.
learning_note: Credential stuffing abuses password reuse and weak account protections across services.

game_text: Attach to Network Position. Network Attacks cost 1 less until Blue Team plays Password Reset or MFA.
flavor_text: The remote doorway stayed open.
learning_note: Remote access accounts require MFA logging and fast revocation during suspected compromise.

game_text: Deal 2 damage to Billing Database SCADA Web Interface or Engineering Workstation. If MFA is inactive draw 1 card.
flavor_text: The trusted portal became the shortcut.
learning_note: Third-party and vendor portals can become access paths into sensitive environments.

game_text: If Redundant Backup or Backup is active deal 2 damage to it. Blue Team discards 1 card.
flavor_text: The backup link was not private.
learning_note: Cloud storage exposure can reveal operational files backups diagrams or sensitive data.

game_text: While active Credential Attack and Password Spray deal +1 damage against Application Assets.
flavor_text: The login page was never meant to be public.
learning_note: Exposed administrative interfaces increase the risk of credential attacks and unauthorized access.

game_text: When Red Team plays Public Data Leak or Website Defacement Blue Team loses 1 additional SCP. Blue Team may remove this by playing Public Communications Plan.
flavor_text: The story had a place to spread.
learning_note: Public leak infrastructure increases reputation pressure and incident communication demands.

game_text: Reveal two Blue Team cards from hand. Choose one Asset revealed this way; the next Attack against it costs 1 less.
flavor_text: The post included just enough truth.
learning_note: Publicly shared internal details can help attackers choose targets and timing.

game_text: The next Internet Attack deals +2 damage but Red Team skips Recon next turn.
flavor_text: Cheap traffic made the attack loud.
learning_note: Commodity services can add pressure but noisy activity is easier to detect and may be out of scope in real testing.

game_text: Look at Blue Team's active Assets. Choose one public-facing Asset; attacks against it cost 1 less this turn.
flavor_text: The cause picked the target before the tool did.
learning_note: Hacktivist targeting often follows public narratives exposed brands and visible services.

game_text: If any Asset is damaged Blue Team must discard 1 card or lose 1 SCP.
flavor_text: The incident became a headline.
learning_note: External pressure can force rushed decisions during cyber incidents.

game_text: Reveal the top 3 Blue Team cards. You may discard one Realm card revealed this way.
flavor_text: The paste had more context than expected.
learning_note: Public pastes and shared screenshots can expose names systems credentials or operational clues.

game_text: Provides 1 Internet resource. If used for Delivery or Actions on Objectives draw 1 card then discard 1 card.
flavor_text: The crowd funded the campaign.
learning_note: Hacktivist groups may rely on public support attention and shared tooling rather than deep technical capability.

game_text: Once per turn reduce the cost of a Delivery card by 1 if Red Team played Recon this turn.
flavor_text: Someone in the chat clicked first.
learning_note: Volunteer participants can increase campaign volume without improving tradecraft.

game_text: Once per turn, after Red Team plays an Event, draw 1 card then discard 1 card.
flavor_text: The channel turned outrage into a plan.
learning_note: Coordination turns loose activity into repeatable pressure against selected targets.

game_text: If Website Defacement Public Data Leak or Leak Site is active Blue Team loses 2 SCP. Otherwise Blue Team loses 1 SCP.
flavor_text: The technical incident became a trust incident.
learning_note: Cyber incidents can become business and community crises even when physical operations recover.
